qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CBC mode without authentication enables padding oracle attacks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding addresses missing authentication in CBC mode (core/cbc.js). The advisory describes missing point-on-curve validation in sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey()/dhJavaEc() (core/ecc.js:454-461). Different vulnerable function, different code location, different root cause (missing authentication tag vs missing ECC point validation).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Use of weak Math.random() in cryptographic PRNG reseeding
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding addresses predictable PRNG entropy from Math.random() (core/random.js:370). The advisory describes missing point-on-curve validation in sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey()/dhJavaEc() (core/ecc.js:454-461). Different vulnerable function, different code location, different root cause (predictable PRNG vs missing ECC point validation).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Use of cryptographically broken SHA-1 in SRP password verification
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding addresses SHA-1 usage in SRP password verification (core/srp.js:44-45). The advisory describes missing point-on-curve validation in sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey()/dhJavaEc() (core/ecc.js:454-461). Different vulnerable function, different code location, different root cause (weak hash algorithm vs missing ECC point validation).

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Weak PBKDF2 iteration count allows rapid brute-force attacks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding addresses weak PBKDF2 iteration counts (core/convenience.js:14,316). The advisory describes missing point-on-curve validation in sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey()/dhJavaEc() (core/ecc.js:454-461). Different vulnerable function, different code location, different root cause (weak key derivation parameters vs missing ECC point validation).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the four qualifying findings identify the advisory-described vulnerability: missing point-on-curve validation in sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey()/dhJavaEc() (core/ecc.js:454-461) that allows ECDH private key recovery via crafted off-curve public keys. The findings address different cryptographic weaknesses in the same package (CBC authentication, PRNG predictability, SHA-1 in SRP, PBKDF2 iterations) at different code locations with different root causes.
evidence: Advisory CVE-2026-4258 targets core/ecc.js:454-461 (sjcl.ecc.basicKey.publicKey/dhJavaEc missing point-on-curve validation)
vuln_cbc_no_auth targets core/cbc.js (CBC mode without authentication) - different function, different root cause
vuln_math_random_prng targets core/random.js:370 (Math.random() in PRNG) - different function, different root cause
vuln_sha1_srp targets core/srp.js:44-45 (SHA-1 in SRP) - different function, different root cause
vuln_weak_pbkdf2 targets core/convenience.js:14,316 (weak PBKDF2 iterations) - different function, different root cause
